acceptance_rule: Pi_path(c, mode_1 -> mode_2) = 1[Delta in A(I)] * 1[trajectory subset of M_feas(I)] * 1[Tau_readout(c, mode_1 -> mode_2) > 0]
supporting_transport_law: Tau_readout(c, mode_1 -> mode_2) = Tau_read^(f_c) + Phi(mode_1 -> mode_2) - switch_cost(c, mode_1, mode_2)

fruit.path_condition: stabilize->read open AND switching-aware readout positive

animal.path_condition: stabilize->read open AND switching-aware readout positive

abstract.path_condition: stabilize->read open AND switching-aware readout positive

verdict.core_answer: P3 can now be pruned by path openness: only candidate families that preserve an admissible, switching-aware readout path should remain.
